title: winteraceae
intro: The rank of Winteraceae is a family of flowering plants, which is a taxonomic grouping that includes a collection of related genera. It is defined as a taxonomic rank that groups a set of genera together based on shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships. The Winteraceae family is a relatively small and distinct group, comprising about 100 species spread across 15 to 20 genera. This family is often found in temperate and subtropical regions, particularly in the Southern Hemisphere.
